title: AND after ON () of LEFT OUTER JOIN with certain expressions will cause crash
poc:
SELECT * FROM table1 t1 
 	LEFT OUTER JOIN table2 t2 
 		ON (t1.taskid = t2.taskid) 
 		AND (
 			t1.cid IS NULL OR 
 			t1.cid = t2.taskid OR 
 			t2.cname = 'test'
 		);

SELECT * FROM table1 t1 
 	LEFT OUTER JOIN table2 t2 
 		ON (t1.taskid = t2.taskid) 
 		WHERE (
 			t1.cid IS NULL OR 
 			t1.cid = t2.taskid OR 
 			t2.cname = 'test'
 		);
key_bug_features: AND after ON in LEFT OUTER JOIN causes crash
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE "sys"."table1" ("taskid" INTEGER NOT NULL, "cid" INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY ("taskid"));
CREATE TABLE "sys"."table2" ("taskid" INTEGER NOT NULL, "cname" VARCHAR(255), PRIMARY KEY ("taskid"));
SELECT * FROM table1 t1 LEFT OUTER JOIN table2 t2 ON (t1.taskid = t2.taskid) AND (t1.cid IS NULL OR t1.cid = t2.taskid OR t2.cname = 'test');
